MAIN_PAGE.SUMMARY:
I am currently a Data Developer, improving my skills in the analysis, organization, and maintenance of operational data. I have solid experience as a front-end developer, along with additional experience in back-end development and databases.

As a professional, my goal is to engage with a variety of technologies, leveraging my software development and data expertise to create robust and efficient solutions that deliver value to businesses.
